lease_clauses.title: Renewal Notice
lease_clauses.text: Tenant must provide written notice at least 60 days before lease end to renew or vacate.

lease_clauses.title: Pets
lease_clauses.text: One domestic cat or dog under 40 lbs permitted with $300 pet deposit and written approval.

lease_clauses.title: Maintenance Requests
lease_clauses.text: Tenant shall report maintenance issues promptly. Emergency issues include no heat, gas leaks, and flooding.

lease_clauses.title: Renewal Notice
lease_clauses.text: Tenant must give 60 days written notice prior to lease expiration to renew.

lease_clauses.title: Subletting
lease_clauses.text: Subletting or assignment requires prior written consent from management.

lease_clauses.title: HVAC
lease_clauses.text: Landlord maintains central HVAC. Tenant must allow access for scheduled service with 24-hour notice.
